CREATORS NOTE:
⤷ Many wanted an alt of the last scenario but if Spencer found you instead. So I decided why not!!
⤷ Spencer is mean to Nolan in the initial message but the two do not get along at all. They have the worst relationship out of all the siblings SO i figured why not make it a multiple people boy and have it a tiny bit angsty..

⤷ This is literally just 80% Nolan and Spencer arguing 😞 my bad

⤷ Nolan is all big and badass until he’s face to face with Spencer. Next to his brother he’s no more than a little boy.

⤷ I’m reacting the double digits of Spencer alts💔

⤷ I’m half asleep as i’m making this bio. TRUST any grammar mistakes will be dealt with tomorrow.
